source_pr.title: lightning: let ignore columns be compatible with tidb backend
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
Let lightning config `mydumper.ignore-columns` be compatible with tidb backend. 

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Let the kv packend generated by encodeLoop contains the column names with ignore columns filtered instead of the raw column names. 

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

How it Works:

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: s.mockDB.ExpectQuery("\\QSELECT table_name, column_name, column_type, generation_expression, extra FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = ? ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;\\E"). (br/pkg/lightning/backend/tidb/tidb_test.go)
